creator: mvh@ix.netcom.com
text:
Both the postfix port and the cyrus-imapd port use processes named
'master' to control their services, and they both install a 'master.8'
manpage, so if you install both ports one of the man pages will be
overwritten.  This is quite likely as both are used for email...

Fix: 

Perhaps rename the manpages?  I assume that this has come up before so
I leave it up to the ports people...
How-To-Repeat: Install cyrus-imapd and postfix.
